events.label: assistant
events.text: Assessment written to `/app/answer.json`. Summary: the spool fit-up is roughed in (~70% complete) but has an installed-defective flange — bolt-hole rotation is wrong because two-holing was missed, so it doesn't match the iso drawing orientation. This is a `fail` at medium risk (caught pre-bolt-up, not yet in service): hold final bolt-up, rotate the flange to correct orientation, re-verify against the iso drawing, and get QC re-inspection before proceeding.
